## RuntimeContext.getRuntimeIngredient() method

Gets a runtime ingredient by ID. Implements IConfectionContext interface.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getRuntimeIngredient(id: IngredientId): Result<IRuntimeIngredient>;
```
